message:
feat: add KubeVirt section to LocalClustersSection settings

Add a KubeVirt platform section alongside vCluster in the local
clusters settings page. Detects KubeVirt installation by checking
for the kubevirt namespace on connected clusters, shows per-cluster
status, and provides an AI-guided install mission button plus a
deep-link to /missions/install-kubevirt.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -447,7 +447,19 @@
       "vclusterCreateNew": "Create Virtual Cluster",
       "vclusterDefaultNamespace": "vcluster",
       "vclusterDeleteConfirm": "Delete virtual cluster \"{{name}}\" in namespace \"{{namespace}}\"? This cannot be undone.",
-      "selectHostCluster": "Select a host cluster..."
+      "selectHostCluster": "Select a host cluster...",
+      "kubevirtSection": "KubeVirt",
+      "kubevirtDesc": "Run virtual machines on Kubernetes clusters",
+      "kubevirtInstalled": "KubeVirt installed",
+      "kubevirtNotInstalled": "Not installed",
+      "kubevirtInstallOnCluster": "Install with AI Agent",
+      "kubevirtNoClusters": "No connected clusters. Connect a cluster to check for KubeVirt.",
+      "kubevirtDetectedCount": "KubeVirt detected on {{count}} cluster(s)",
+      "kubevirtDetectedCount_one": "KubeVirt detected on {{count}} cluster",
+      "kubevirtDetectedCount_other": "KubeVirt detected on {{count}} clusters",
+      "kubevirtNotDetected": "KubeVirt Not Detected",
+      "kubevirtInstallHint": "KubeVirt lets you run virtual machines alongside containers on your Kubernetes clusters. Use the guided mission to install it.",
+      "kubevirtOpenMission": "Open Install KubeVirt Mission"
     },

       "title": "Backup & Sync",
